user_input: ВИП карточки, фон самих карт сделай чуть темнее

name: read
output:
<path>${HOME}/Library/Application Support/Open Design/namespaces/release-stable/data/projects/proj-001/speakers-grid.html</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: 
2: <!doctype html>
3: <html lang="ru">
4: <head>
5: <meta charset="utf-8">
6: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
7: <title>Спикеры — IX Всероссийский слёт молодёжи</title>
8: <style>
9: :root {
10:   --bg:      oklch(99% 0.002 240);
11:   --surface: oklch(100% 0 0);
12:   --fg:      oklch(18% 0.012 250);
13:   --muted:   oklch(54% 0.012 250);
14:   --border:  oklch(92% 0.005 250);
15:   --accent:  oklch(58% 0.18 255);
16: 
17:   --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;
18:   --font-body:    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif;
19: 
20:   --radius: 16px;
21:   --shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
22:   --shadow-hover: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.08), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
23: }
24: 
25: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
26: 
27: body {
28:   font-family: var(--font-body);
29:   background: var(--bg);
30:   color: var(--fg);
31:   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
32:   line-height: 1.5;
33: }
34: 
35: .container {
36:   max-width: 1400px;
37:   margin: 0 auto;
38:   padding: 80px 24px;
39: }
40: 
41: .header {
42:   text-align: center;
43:   margin-bottom: 64px;
44: }
45: 
46: .header-kicker {
47:   font-size: 13px;
48:   font-weight: 600;
49:   text-transform: uppercase;
50:   letter-spacing: .12em;
51:   color: var(--accent);
52:   margin-bottom: 12px;
53: }
54: 
55: .header h1 {
56:   font-family: var(--font-display);
57:   font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px);
58:   font-weight: 700;
59:   letter-spacing: -.02em;
60:   line-height: 1.15;
61:   margin-bottom: 12px;
62: }
63: 
64: .header p {
65:   font-size: 17px;
66:   color: var(--muted);
67:   max-width: 560px;
68:   margin: 0 auto;
69: }
70: 
71: .speaker-grid {
72:   display: grid;
73:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
74:   gap: 24px;
75: }
76: 
77: .speaker-card {
78:   background: var(--surface);
79:   border-radius: var(--radius);
80:   overflow: hidden;
81:   box-shadow: var(--shadow);
82:   transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), box-shadow .35s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
83:   will-change: transform;
84:   cursor: default;
85:   border: 2px solid var(--border);
86:   display: flex;
87:   flex-direction: column;
88: }
89: 
90: .speaker-card.vip {
91:   border-color: var(--accent);
92: }
93: 
94: .speaker-card:hover {
95:   transform: scale(1.04);
96:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover);
97: }
98: 
99: .speaker-photo {
100:   position: relative;
101:   width: min(240px, 80%);
102:   aspect-ratio: 1;
103:   border-radius: 50%;
104:   display: flex;
105:   align-items: center;
106:   justify-content: center;
107:   overflow: hidden;
108:   margin: 32px auto 24px;
109: }
110: 
111: .speaker-photo img {
112:   width: 100%;
113:   height: 100%;
114:   object-fit: cover;
115:   display: block;
116: }
117: 
118: 
119: .speaker-info {
120:   padding: 20px 20px 28px;
121:   flex: 1;
122: }
123: 
124: .speaker-name {
125:   font-family: var(--font-display);
126:   font-size: 18px;
127:   font-weight: 600;
128:   letter-spacing: -.01em;
129:   line-height: 1.25;
130:   margin-bottom: 4px;
131: }
132: 
133: .speaker-position {
134:   font-size: 14px;
135:   color: var(--muted);
136:   line-height: 1.4;
137:   margin-bottom: 2px;
138: }
139: 
140: .speaker-org {
141:   font-size: 14px;
142:   font-weight: 500;
143:   color: var(--fg);
144:   line-height: 1.4;
145:   margin-bottom: 10px;
146: }
147: 
148: .speaker-desc {
149:   font-size: 14px;
150:   color: var(--muted);
151:   line-height: 1.5;
152:   display: -webkit-box;
153:   -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
154:   -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
155:   overflow: hidden;
156: }
157: 
158: .speaker-card {
159:   opacity: 0;
160:   transform: translateY(30px);
161: }
162:
